title: Flow Tagger
description: Open Source clientside mod that displays flowpvp.gg ranks on nametags, tab, & chat
body: FlowTagger is an **open source** client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft **1.21.9 – 1.21.11** that allows you to customize nametags, tab, & chat of players to display various playerdata from **flowpvp.gg** > The only network activity the mod does is send read-only GET requests to flowpvp.gg/api/ranked/ to fetch json data of user statistics like their rank # UI # Tag # Tab # Chat
